word: G4381 - προσωπολήπτης - prosōpolḗptēs - pros-o-pol-ape'-tace - Respecter of persons

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσωπολήπτης

- Transliteration: Prosopoleptes

- Phonetic: pros-o-pol-ape'-tace

- Definition:

1. an acceptor of persons

2. one who discriminates

- Origin: from G4383 and G2983

- TDNT entry: 19:00,0

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G4383 and G2983; an accepter of a face (individual) that is (specifically) one exhibiting partiality: - respecter of persons.
